title: Redundant collection functions should be avoided
description: Avoid using redundant collection functions such as list comprehension or map when a simple loop would suffice.

noncompliant.description: Using list comprehension for squaring numbers.

compliant.description: Using a simple loop for squaring numbers.

why_is_this_an_issue: List comprehension and map are more memory-intensive and slower compared to simple loops for large collections.
how_to_fix: Replace list comprehension or map with a simple loop.
